tagline: A 7-agent AI team running on a Mac Mini, with a full orchestration platform (Command Center) on top. Built to run a 120-person business and compound learning daily.

agents.name: BarleyBot
agents.description: The CEO of the agent team. Named after Siva's dog Barley. Handles intake, delegates to specialists, resolves conflicts, enforces the constitution, and reports up. Does not code or research directly — orchestrates those who do.

agents.name: Coffee
agents.description: Deep research specialist. Runs competitive intel, market analysis, and synthesis before any build. Structured output saved to workspace/research/. Bound to a dedicated Telegram group for full research context.

agents.name: Coder
agents.description: Heavy-lifting coding agent. Ships features, refactors, fixes bugs, and runs git workflows. Operates from its own dedicated workspace so commits don't cross wires with the orchestrator.

agents.name: Picasso
agents.description: UI / UX and design systems agent. Handles any visual work, UI reviews, brand consistency, and design tokens. Reads Figma exports, writes component specs, audits existing UI.

agents.name: TodoBot
agents.description: Task tracker and scheduler. Owns active.md, maintains priorities, runs daily standups, and closes the loop on every task. Every status change flows through TodoBot.

agents.name: MarketerBot
agents.description: Content and social media agent. Drafts LinkedIn posts, ship announcements, and blog briefs based on what was actually built. No hype, no generic AI commentary — business problems first.

agents.name: HealthBot
agents.description: Personal health + performance coach. Tracks a 100-day program, reads Whoop data, interprets sleep and training load, and holds the operator accountable. Reports to Siva directly — not part of the BarleyBot delegation chain.

command_center.name: Command Center
command_center.tagline: The orchestration platform on top of the agent team.
command_center.stack: Next.js 15 + SSE + LaunchAgent on Mac Mini
command_center.description: A full web UI for running multi-agent pipelines. Blueprints like research-build, full-feature, new-project, bug-fix, marketing-campaign, design-review. Starts runs, routes review gates to Telegram, tracks cost per agent, shows live logs, files, projects + OKRs.
features: 6 blueprints (full-feature, research-build, bug-fix, marketing-campaign, design-review, new-project)
Cost intelligence per agent + demo mode
Projects + OKR framework with PROJECT.md parser
Files page with categories, markdown preview, Obsidian links
Unified state endpoint with SSE streaming
command_center.status: Live — LaunchAgent on Mac Mini, Tailscale-accessible

automations.name: Podcast Digest
automations.description: Scans 81 podcast feeds, surfaces new episodes, picks the 3 most relevant for the day.

automations.name: RSS Digest
automations.description: Scans 13 RSS feeds across AI, ops, and business. Surfaces new articles since last check.

automations.name: Daily Wrap + LinkedIn Drafts
automations.description: Reads today's memory + GitHub events API across 7 repos. Writes a log entry to siva-builds. Drafts 2 LinkedIn posts. Triggers Vercel rebuild so this site updates automatically.
automations.output: siva-builds commit + Vercel deploy + Telegram summary

automations.name: Daily OpenClaw Idea
automations.description: Sends one concrete OpenClaw automation idea to the Ideas Telegram group. Rotates through a 98-idea master file.

automations.name: QMD Reindex
automations.description: Rebuilds the semantic search index across the entire workspace. Keeps BarleyBot's memory retrieval fresh.
automations.output: Updated vector index (Metal GPU, Apple M4)

automations.name: Curated Daily Digest
automations.description: Tavily + Gemini-powered curated news digest across business, AI, and operations. Fallback chain ensures delivery even on API limits.

automations.name: HealthBot Morning Briefing
automations.description: Reads Whoop recovery, sleep, and HRV. Writes a daily briefing with training recommendation and yesterday's adherence.

memory.description: Active conversation memory. Ephemeral — lives only during the session.
Raw notes written during and after each session. What was discussed, built, decided.
Curated and distilled. Updated during heartbeats and monthly memory decay. The stuff that matters across weeks and months.
QMD-powered vector search over the entire workspace. Rebuilt nightly. Used by memory_search when recall matters.

integrations.name: Telegram
integrations.use: Primary interface — 7 dedicated bots, one per agent, each bound to its own group.

integrations.name: GitHub
integrations.use: Read all private repos. Write to siva-builds and siva-proof-of-work.

integrations.name: Vercel
integrations.use: Auto-deploy this site on every siva-builds push via deploy hook.

integrations.name: Anthropic
integrations.use: Claude Opus 4.6 + Sonnet 4.6 for most agents. Adaptive thinking enabled.

integrations.name: OpenAI Codex
integrations.use: GPT-5.4 with thinking: high for MarketerBot, HealthBot, and Coder fallback.

integrations.name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
integrations.use: Gateway web search provider for sub-agents.

integrations.name: Tavily
integrations.use: Deep web search in main BarleyBot session and Coffee research.

integrations.name: Turso
integrations.use: libSQL database backing WalletBot and other data-heavy companions.

integrations.name: Supabase
integrations.use: Shared Postgres for the Hillary's 3-app stack (InSite, SiteCapture, Ops OS).

integrations.name: Whoop
integrations.use: HealthBot pulls recovery, sleep, HRV, and strain via OAuth.

skills.name: deep-research
skills.description: Multi-source research with structured output. Saves to workspace/research/[topic]/.

skills.name: podcast-digest
skills.description: Fetches 81 podcast feeds, filters new episodes, picks the day's best.

skills.name: coding-agent
skills.description: Delegates complex builds to Coder via background process.

skills.name: obsidian
skills.description: Read and write to Obsidian vaults via obsidian-cli.

skills.name: github
skills.description: GitHub operations — issues, PRs, CI, code review via gh CLI.

skills.name: internal-comms
skills.description: Structured formats for internal updates, status reports, ship announcements.

skills.name: orchestration-control
skills.description: Drives the Command Center orchestration platform — start runs, approve / revise / kill review gates.

skills.name: sprint-board
skills.description: Task board for cross-agent work tracking — add tasks, complete, manage sprints.

companions.name: WalletBot
companions.description: Two-person family finance bot. Natural language expense logging — 'Zomato 850' is all you need. Claude classifies to 14 buckets. Dashboard for trends and goals (vacation, emergency fund, kids' education, new home).
companions.note: Not an OpenClaw agent — independent Telegraf.js bot. Handled via BarleyBot routing when the Finance group is active.
